x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: UI Actions that modify incident forms or trigger workflows can conflict with Now Assist contextual actions. Customer UI actions need review to ensure they do not interfere with Now Assist agent assist panels.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: UI Actions on Incident and Task
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom UI actions on incident and task. Test with Now Assist agent assist panel enabled to identify conflicts with Now Assist contextual actions. Target: <25 custom active UI Actions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: UI Actions on Incident and Task

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_76f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c51
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[UI Actions that modify incident forms or trigger workflows can conflict with Now Assist contextual actions. Customer UI actions need review to ensure they do not interfere with Now Assist agent assist panels.]]></ai_justification><check_name>UI Actions on Incident and Task</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_ui_action');
    ga.addQuery('table', 'IN', 'incident,task');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom active UI Actions on incident/task';

    if (count < 25) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low UI Action customization on incident/task (' + count + ' custom actions). Now Assist contextual actions are unlikely to conflict with existing UI customizations.'
        };
    } else if (count < 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom UI Actions on incident/task. Test Now Assist agent assist panel with all custom actions active to identify conflicts.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom UI Actions on incident/task. High UI Action density may conflict with Now Assist contextual actions — review before enablement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000330</number><order>160</order><remediation_guidance>Review custom UI actions on incident and task. Test with Now Assist agent assist panel enabled to identify conflicts with Now Assist contextual actions. Target: <25 custom active UI Actions.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>76f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c51</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>UI Actions on Incident and Task</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_76f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c51</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: UI Actions on Incident and Task

sys_audit_delete.display_value: UI Actions on Incident and Task

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: UI Actions on Incident and Task
